# Headent Client 1.0.0 — first public release 🎉

Headent Client is a modern Android client for **Tvheadend**: live TV, radio,
recordings and a full TV guide — on phones, tablets and Android TV.

This is the first public release, now also available on
**[Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=sk.tvhclient)**.

## Highlights

- **Live TV & radio** over HTSP or the HTTP API, with hardware decoding (libVLC),
  channel zapping, picons, channel groups and parental lock
- **Recordings (DVR)** — browse and play your archive, see recordings directly
  in the TV guide, resume playback where you left off
- **Full TV guide** — day-by-day grid on TV, compact adaptive grid on phones
  with a density toggle, programme details and recording indicators
- **Stream profile switcher** right in the player (HTTP live)
- **Two UI modes** — classic and modern, for both phone and TV layouts
- **Remote control** — control the TV app from your phone
- **31 languages**

## Notes

- Requires a running [Tvheadend](https://tvheadend.org/) server (4.2+ recommended)
- The attached APK is a universal build for sideloading (phones, TV boxes,
  Android TV). On Google Play the app is delivered as optimized per-device splits.
- Website & changelog: https://headentclient.com

Attached below (`*.apk`). Verify with `sha256sum`.
